items.title: Preparing Specs for AI Coding Agents
items.description:

items.title: I built Proofline because AI agents are getting too good at sounding finished
items.description:
AI agents are getting very good at writing final reports.

The problem is not only that they make mistakes. The problem is that sometimes they make mistakes with excellent presentation.

Proofline is a 5-skill Markdown pack that catches fake-ready output before it turns into a release
